provenance.source: NYISO public MIS — Integrated Real-Time Actual Load (palIntegrated), hourly by zone
provenance.notes: avgMW = mean of hourly "Integrated Load" (MW) for zone CENTRL per calendar year; peakMW = max hourly value; hours = hourly observations counted (DST days have 23/25). partial:true marks the in-progress final year. Timestamps are NYISO local time (EST/EDT).
provenance.license: Upstream: no express NYISO license — derived annual figures are facts computed from public operational data, see docs/terms-ledger.md; derived series & aggregation: CC BY 4.0 (The Second Corridor)
provenance.attribution: Computed from New York Independent System Operator public MIS load data
